decisions.decision: Pipeline log stored as single TEXT column (jmix pattern)
decisions.rationale: Aligns with jmix-ai-backend — one pipeline_log column with newline-joined messages, not 3 separate columns

decisions.decision: Parameters UI uses plain YAML textarea + live preview panel
decisions.rationale: User confirmed AllowedModelController unnecessary — YAML is single source of truth; preview panel parses model/retrieval/systemPrompt sections
